nasb.text: So the anger of the Lord was kindled against Israel, and He gave them continually into the hand of Hazael king of Aram, and into the hand of Ben-hadad the son of Hazael.

esv.text: And the anger of the Lord was kindled against Israel, and he gave them continually into the hand of Hazael king of Syria and into the hand of Ben-hadad the son of Hazael.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華的怒氣向以色列發作，常把他們交在亞蘭王哈薛的手中和哈薛的兒子便．哈達的手中。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华向以色列人发怒，屡次使他们败在亚兰王哈薛和他儿子便·哈达手中。
